'''Michael Bell''' (born [[July 30]], [[1930s#1938|1938]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] voice actor, actor and voice director. He provided the voice of [[General]] [[Vanden Huyck Willard]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] who was physically portrayed by [[Eddie Byrne]], although he was uncredited.<ref name="Homing Beacon">{{HBCite|260}}</ref>

He would later return to voice [[Tyr Taskeen]] in the video game ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'', which released in [[2000]]. He also voiced General [[Jan Dodonna]] for the [[2014]] animated television series, ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''. In [[2025]], he voiced [[Gibbs]] in the [[Disney+]] animated anthology television series, ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld]]''.

{{Bio-stub}}
